refundPolicy.title: Refund and Cancellation
refundPolicy.paragraph1: Satsai Finlease Private Limited will automatically start billing as per Your selected Payment Method for the relevant Subscription plan(s) and any Add-on(s) selected by You at the time of registration through the third party payment gateway.
refundPolicy.paragraph2: The cancellation of a Subscription can be done through the "My Account" section of the Site.

processingTime.suffix: for Your payment made to Satsai Finlease Private Limited to be reflected in your Bank Account.

boardApproval.title: Board Approval
boardApproval.value: Board of Directors, Satsai Finlease Private Limited
